channel.title: Tree on Kevin wang's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tree on Kevin wang's blog

item.title: Data structure — trees
item.description: Trees are hierarchical structures in which each node has a parent (except the root) and zero or more children. This article records the principal binary-tree variants, their defining properties, array-based layouts, and typical applications — including the complete binary tree backing a binary heap and the red-black tree used in TreeMap, TreeSet, and HashMap tree bins.
